ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion
Off Calendar Jan-21-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Brandon Tang, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, Superbiiz Inc,
No appearance by defaulted defendant Edward Quach,
Default of Defendant) has been duly entered.

Witness: Sanjeev Markanday Sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $46,975.66
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $800.00
Costs: $604.95
Total Judgment in the amount of $48,380.61

Judgment signed in open court.
